# VoltBot

> Premium electronics and robotics components store based in Bangladesh — Arduino, ESP32, sensors, drones, robotic arms, 3D printing supplies, with fast nationwide delivery.

VoltBot is an e-commerce storefront serving makers, hobbyists, students and engineers across Bangladesh. Every component is sourced from authorized distributors, backed by engineer support and a 7-day money-back guarantee.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Featured products, categories, and store highlights.
- [All Products](/products): Full searchable catalog with filters and sort.
- [Cart](/cart): Review items before checkout.
- [Checkout](/checkout): Cash on delivery, partial payment, and prepaid options.
- [Sign in](/auth): Customer sign-in and account creation.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of public URLs.
